summary: Made two surgical exit-side continuity edits: the recovery grocery delivery now includes the truffle-mushroom ravioli that anchors the Chapter 12 opening, and the final refrigerator interface beat now echoes the family-bundle suggestion language that Chapter 12 immediately cuts to black.
edits: Added truffle-mushroom ravioli to the late-night recovery grocery crate to bridge directly into the next chapter's freezer image.
Revised the final refrigerator UI line to foreground family-bundle suggestions for a cleaner handoff into the Chapter 12 outage opening.
